complexity.justification: Random-access indexed read-then-delete driven by a hard-coded key table, with PERFORM VARYING iteration and error handling on both READ and DELETE

annotation_metadata.note: Every 'lines' range and 'source_snippet' below was checked line-by-line against the uploaded VSCBEX05.cbl using cat -n; paragraph names are the real COBOL paragraph names.

structures.name: PROGRAM_METADATA
structures.source_snippet:
* Program name:    VSCBEX05
* Original author: dastagg
* Description: Example 05: Indexed File Processing: Delete
structures.confidence_justification: Comment header block visually delimited by asterisk banners at lines 1 and 21
structures.description: Program header comment block; states the program deletes 5 records from an indexed file opened I-O, ACCESS MODE IS RANDOM

structures.name: IDENTIFICATION
structures.confidence_justification: IDENTIFICATION DIVISION and PROGRAM-ID are explicit COBOL reserved-word headers

structures.name: ENVIRONMENT_DIV
structures.source_snippet:
CONFIGURATION SECTION.
SOURCE-COMPUTER.   IBM WITH DEBUGGING MODE.

SELECT CUSTFile
ASSIGN TO "../idata/customer.idat"
ORGANIZATION IS INDEXED
RECORD KEY IS CUSTFile-Cust-ID
ACCESS MODE IS RANDOM
FILE STATUS IS WS-CUSTFile-Status.
structures.confidence_justification: ENVIRONMENT DIVISION / FILE-CONTROL / SELECT are explicit. As in VSCBEX04, SOURCE-COMPUTER...WITH DEBUGGING MODE is active (not commented out), so the 'D'-prefixed debug DISPLAY lines are live
structures.description: Declares CUSTFile as an indexed customer file opened for random access, keyed on CUSTFile-Cust-ID; debugging mode is active

structures.name: DATA_DIV
structures.source_snippet:
DATA DIVISION.
FILE SECTION.
FD  CUSTFile.
    COPY CUSTOMER REPLACING ==:tag:== BY ==CUSTFile==.
...
01  WS-Key-HOLD.
    12 FILLER PIC 9(4) VALUE 0010.
...
01  WS-Key-Table-Storage.
    12 WS-Key-Element-Cnt PIC 9 VALUE 5.
structures.confidence_justification: DATA DIVISION, FILE SECTION, and WORKING-STORAGE SECTION headers are explicit; the key table here carries only a bare 4-digit ID per entry (no price), matching VSCBEX03's layout rather than VSCBEX04's
structures.description: File record layout, file-status/counters (records read, records deleted), and a hard-coded table of 5 customer IDs (0010, 0420, 0878, 0210, 0998) in an OCCURS 5 table for keyed lookups

structures.name: MAINLINE
structures.source_snippet:
PROCEDURE DIVISION.
0000-Mainline.
    PERFORM 1000-Begin-Job.
    PERFORM 2000-Process.
    PERFORM 3000-End-Job.
    GOBACK.
structures.confidence_justification: PROCEDURE DIVISION plus 0000-Mainline paragraph unambiguously mark program entry
structures.description: Program entry point; straight-line perform of begin/process/end phases

structures.name: BEGIN_JOB
structures.source_snippet:
1000-Begin-Job.
    MOVE WS-Key-HOLD  TO WS-Key-Table-Setup.
    OPEN I-O CUSTFile.
D    DISPLAY "CUSTFile Open Status: " WS-CUSTFile-Status.
structures.confidence_justification: MOVE and OPEN are direct initialization actions; OPEN I-O is required because DELETE needs update access, not just INPUT
structures.description: Loads the 5 hard-coded customer IDs into the working key table and opens CUSTFile for random I-O

structures.name: PROCESS_LOOP
structures.source_snippet:
2000-Process.
    PERFORM VARYING WS-Key-SUB FROM 1 BY 1
       UNTIL WS-Key-SUB > WS-Key-Element-Cnt
       MOVE WS-Key-Value(WS-Key-SUB) TO
          CUSTFile-Cust-ID
       PERFORM 5000-Read-CUSTFile
       PERFORM 2100-Delete-CUSTFile
    END-PERFORM.
structures.confidence_justification: PERFORM VARYING...UNTIL...END-PERFORM is explicit indexed-loop syntax
structures.description: Iterates the 5-entry key table; for each entry sets the record key, reads the matching record, then performs the delete paragraph

structures.name: DELETE_RECORD
structures.confidence_justification: Single explicit PERFORM; this paragraph is a thin wrapper with no logic of its own
structures.description: Thin dispatcher paragraph that performs the actual DELETE I/O paragraph for the current key

structures.name: END_JOB
structures.source_snippet:
3000-End-Job.
    DISPLAY EOJ-End-Message.
    DISPLAY "      Records Read: " FD-CUSTFile-Record-Cnt
    DISPLAY "   Records Deleted: " FD-CUSTFile-Delete-Cnt

    CLOSE CUSTFile.
D    DISPLAY "CUSTFile Close Status: " WS-CUSTFile-Status.
structures.confidence_justification: DISPLAY and CLOSE statements clearly indicate termination/cleanup
structures.description: Displays end-of-job banner, records-read count, and records-deleted count, then closes CUSTFile

structures.name: READ_RANDOM
structures.source_snippet:
5000-Read-CUSTFile.
    READ CUSTFile
       RECORD KEY IS CUSTFile-Cust-ID
    END-READ.
    IF WS-CUSTFile-Good
       ADD +1 TO FD-CUSTFile-Record-Cnt
    ELSE
       IF WS-CUSTFile-EOF
          NEXT SENTENCE
       ELSE
          DISPLAY "** ERROR **: 5000-Read-CUSTFile"
          ...
          PERFORM 3000-End-Job
          MOVE 8 TO RETURN-CODE
          GOBACK
       END-IF
    END-IF.
structures.confidence_justification: READ...RECORD KEY IS is explicit, but the paragraph combines success counting, a not-found branch, and a hard-error abend path
structures.description: Performs a keyed random read against CUSTFile using the current key, positioning the file for the subsequent DELETE; increments the read counter on success, abends on genuine I/O error

structures.name: DELETE_CUSTFILE
structures.source_snippet:
6000-Delete-CUSTFile.
    DELETE CUSTFile.
    IF WS-CUSTFile-Good
       ADD +1 TO FD-CUSTFile-Delete-Cnt
    ELSE
       DISPLAY "** ERROR **: 6000-Delete-CUSTFile"
       DISPLAY "Delete CUSTFile Failed."
       DISPLAY "File Status: " WS-CUSTFile-Status
       PERFORM 3000-End-Job
       MOVE 8 TO RETURN-CODE
       GOBACK
    END-IF.
structures.confidence_justification: DELETE is explicit and takes no operand (it deletes the record most recently READ by key); error handling is a plain file-status IF/ELSE
structures.description: Deletes the record at the file's current key position (set by the preceding READ); increments the delete counter on success, on any failure displays diagnostics and abends with RETURN-CODE 8. Unlike 5000-Read-CUSTFile, there is no debug DISPLAY of the deleted record here.
